emails.subject: UBS Group
emails.body: UBS Group Andy, How are you doing? Will you be in John Lavorato's group or in the Power group, when we move to UBS. Also, what commodities will you be trading? Thanks, Errol

emails.subject: RE: UBS Group
emails.body: RE: UBS Group I will be running the power options desk with UBS. I will still be trading gas though. how about you

emails.subject: RE: UBS Group
emails.body: I will continue to run the financial risk desk. To: McLaughlin Jr., Errol
